fields.name: Relation Table ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the relation table for which related table information is provided.

fields.name: Relation Table Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the relation table for which related table information is provided.

fields.name: Related Fields
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of related fields in the relation table that are associated with the configuration table.

fields.name: In Worksheet
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the related table for the configuration table is included in the configuration worksheet.
